description: Tasks template for the PhotoAlbum Azure modernization plan based on assessment report report-20260623132400.

tasks.description: Upgrade PhotoAlbum to the latest .NET LTS baseline. Addresses issues: Project's target framework(s) needs to be changed, Binary incompatible for selected .NET version, NuGet package upgrade is recommended, Behavioral change in selected .NET version, NuGet package is deprecated.
tasks.reason: The assessment report proposes moving the application from net9.0 to net10.0 before Azure-focused migration work so later service migrations can build on a supported runtime baseline.
tasks.requirements: Upgrade PhotoAlbum and PhotoAlbum.Tests from net9.0 to net10.0, update affected package references to compatible versions, and resolve the assessed API compatibility findings while preserving current gallery behavior.

tasks.description: Migrate photo binary storage from local uploads to Azure Blob Storage. Addresses issues: Local or network IO operations detected.
tasks.reason: Photo upload, retrieval, and deletion currently depend on the local file system, which is not cloud-friendly for scaled Azure hosting.
tasks.requirements: Replace local photo file storage in the PhotoAlbum application with Azure Blob Storage while preserving upload, retrieval, and delete workflows, maintaining metadata consistency, and using managed identity-based authentication for Azure access.

tasks.description: Migrate photo metadata persistence from SQL Server LocalDB to Azure SQL Database. Addresses issues: SQL database connection detected, Connection string is detected, Windows authentication detected, Connection strings without configuration builders detected.
tasks.reason: The application stores metadata in a LocalDB-backed SQL Server configuration that depends on local machine connectivity and local connection settings.
tasks.requirements: Migrate PhotoAlbum metadata persistence from SQL Server LocalDB to Azure SQL Database, replace local connection-string and Windows-authentication assumptions with managed identity-based access, and preserve EF Core-based photo metadata operations.

tasks.description: Externalize non-secret application settings to Azure App Configuration. Addresses issues: Local application configuration detected.
tasks.reason: The assessment identifies repository-local configuration values in appsettings files that should be externalized for cloud-ready configuration management.
tasks.requirements: Move non-secret PhotoAlbum runtime settings from local appsettings files into Azure App Configuration while preserving the existing configuration shape for upload settings, logging settings, and other non-secret application values.

tasks.description: Scan dependencies for CVEs and remediate any supported vulnerability findings before deployment readiness work.
tasks.reason: Every modernization plan must include security remediation so the migrated application is not advanced with known dependency vulnerabilities.
tasks.requirements: Scan all project dependencies for known CVEs, upgrade vulnerable dependencies to the minimum patched versions, document any major-version remediation risk, and verify the project still builds and tests successfully after remediation.
